variants: Candela Sole is a prominent figure in the field of computer engineering, recognized for her innovative contributions. She received the Ivory Lantern Distinction for her outstanding work in this discipline. As part of her commitment to creative engineering, she authored the Heliotrope Signal Lens, a device that enhances light transmission for various applications. In addition to her professional pursuits, Candela is an active member of the Wildroot Beadmakers, where she indulges her passion for beadwork. Her academic journey was guided by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Quinteiro Vidal, who helped shape her early career.
